---
title: "Week 7: GEE Classificaiton 1"
---

## Summary

This week we spent more time in GEE covering ways of working with classification algorithms, dealing with cloud coverage and using the GAUL dataset of administrative boundaries.

### Supervised v Unsupervised Classification

-   supervised v unsupervised

    -   parametric non parametric

    -   types of methods

-   Hard and soft differences for classification regimes - difficulty in choosing one based on homogeneity/gradual differences interesting for various research topics

### Methods 

-   CART

    -   regression

    -   decision trees

-   SVM

### Limitations

-   Limitations of Predictive algorithms for forecasting into the future

## Applications

-   Urban forests in china

-   Practical training and classificaiton for Gdansk

-   compare with something

## Reflections

-   use in Local govt, dense urban london spaces

-   even higher resolution data than 10m
